acceptance_targets: [chapter_05_F04] The revised final paragraph ends on a specific sensory or behavioral consequence visible in the room, and it does not rely on abstract summary phrases such as the night becoming "riskier," "binding," or more than "comfort" to tell the reader what changed.

[FBR-004] Pass if a close read of snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1501-1835 no longer hears the same abstract register words carrying beat after beat, and the scene still feels unmistakably like Cora and Thea in this room. Fail if the revised passage still depends on reiterating "clean/plain/practical/exact" or obvious near-cousins to tell the reader what each turn means.

findings.acceptance_test: The revised final paragraph ends on a specific sensory or behavioral consequence visible in the room, and it does not rely on abstract summary phrases such as the night becoming "riskier," "binding," or more than "comfort" to tell the reader what changed.
findings.evidence: After Thea delays Lincoln and the basin proves the present can be recorded, the chapter closes in abstract summary at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:493, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:495, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:497.
findings.problem: The chapter's final beat retreats from the immediate room into thematic synopsis just when the basin revelation has made secrecy more dangerous and concrete. That step back reads as timidity: the prose names the night's significance instead of ending on an observable consequence that lets the reader feel the new danger in the body of the scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the ending at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:493-497 so the last image stays inside the charged physical aftermath of the basin memory and Thea's provisional choice. Land on a concrete action, sound, bodily response, or spoken condition tied to the bowl, the bed, the wall, the clock, or the coming daylight, rather than narrator summary.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a close read of snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1501-1835 no longer hears the same abstract register words carrying beat after beat, and the scene still feels unmistakably like Cora and Thea in this room. Fail if the revised passage still depends on reiterating "clean/plain/practical/exact" or obvious near-cousins to tell the reader what each turn means.
findings.problem: This chapter is one of the clearest cases of style-bible token overfit. The prose repeatedly reaches for the abstract evaluators the bible uses as guidance words - "clean," "plain," "practical," "exact" - until the intimacy scene starts sounding like it is citing the rubric back to the reader rather than discovering its own language.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1501-1513, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1575-1611, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1751-1765, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1809-1835 so the emotional turns are carried by concrete domestic, bodily, and period-specific detail rather than a repeating chain of abstract verdict-words. Keep the erotic candor and the basin-memory risk; vary the diction doing the evaluative work.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into queer secrecy, erotic specificity, dust-sick bodies, economic shame, bad bargains, and the humiliations of dependence. When deciding between a tidier scene and a truer one, choose the version that preserves historical pressure and emotional contradiction even if it leaves characters compromised, unsympathetic, or exposed.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If grief, desire, debt, illness, bodily damage, or shame are abstracted at the moment they should become sensory and social, rewrite toward the concrete consequence until the scene stops hiding from itself.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: moderate-high - contractions are the baseline for speech; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, social performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate structural rhythms across the book: survival set-piece, aftermath inventory, intimate chamber scene, bureaucratic squeeze, outdoor search, quiet communal ritual, preparation without payoff, public reckoning, and departure elegy. Vary scene counts, dialogue density, and where the turn comes from so consecutive chapters never feel built from the same dramatic machine.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken and period-credible, with agricultural, domestic, and biblical undertones used sparingly; favor exact nouns and verbs over decorative frontier lyricism.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person rotating among Cora, Thea, Dell, August, and Hester, with only brief collective widening when weather or communal memory demands it
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive prose: longer weather and labor sentences that can suddenly snap short at revelation, pain, or shame.
